items.name: Grimoire of the Necrotic Skull
items.description: This ancient and twisted grimoire, with its blackened pages and gnarled bindings, is adorned with a chilling skull's visage on its cover. Its contents are filled with dark and arcane knowledge, capable of awakening ancient and terrible powers beyond human comprehension. Beware, for the cursed pages of this tome whisper secrets of death and decay, tempting those who dare to seek its forbidden knowledge.
